---
title: "Die Bedeutung der NFDI für die Numismatik"
subtitle: "Können Daten unfair sein?"
lang: de
date: today
date-modified: last-modified
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
---


{{< include fragments/digital_fair_data_nfdi.inc.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/digital_fair_data_nfdi_ta.inc.qmd >}}


{{< include fragments/digital_fair_data_quiz.inc.qmd >}}
